title: Platform Overview for Museum Partners
body: See how guided visits, tickets, marketplace sections, and reports work together.
subtitle: For museum teams, sponsors, agencies, and cultural partners.

title: Museum Impact Dashboard
body: This page helps partners understand how visitors use the museum.
subtitle: See visits, tickets, guide questions, and marketplace interest.

title: Join the Museum Marketplace
body: Share cultural products, learning offers, and visitor experiences with museum audiences.
subtitle: Artists, schools, sponsors, and culture partners can apply.

title: Ask ARIA About the Museum
body: Ask a simple question. ARIA will guide you through the museum experience.
subtitle: ARIA explains exhibits, stories, symbols, and next steps.

title: Choose Your Museum Access
body: Visit the museum online or in person. Choose the option that fits your visit.
subtitle: Pick free, premium, school, or group access.

title: Launch a Digital Museum
body: This page is for museum teams, sponsors, schools, and public agencies.
subtitle: Bring a museum online with guided visits, tickets, and reports.

title: Begin the Museum Journey
body: Tap story points, learn from ARIA, and follow the cultural path at your pace.
subtitle: Move through the museum one scene at a time.

title: Enter the Asian Operatic Museum
body: Start your visit, ask ARIA for help, or view museum access options.
subtitle: A virtual museum for stories, costumes, music, and cultural memory.

title: Museum Products and Gifts
body: Find objects and stories connected to the museum journey.
subtitle: Browse cultural items, learning packs, and digital experiences.

title: Project Documentation Notes
body: This page records what has been completed and what still needs testing.
subtitle: Read current project progress, proof notes, and remaining checks.
